I recommend lowering it to 0.\n\n---\n\n### Final personal estimate:\n\n**Malware score:** 0 — no malicious behavior detected.\n\n**Obfuscated score:** 0 — clear, standard code.\n\n**Risk score:** 0 — the code is a benign utility for interacting with a smart contract, with no security risks.\n\n---\n\n**Summary:**\n\n- The reports are accurate in their assessments.\n- The scores are generally appropriate; the minor security risk in report 4 should be adjusted downward.\n- The code is standard, safe, and has no signs of malicious intent or vulnerabilities.\n\n**Conclusion:** The code is safe, and the reports correctly identify it as such.",
